title: DO NOT MERGE - playing with buildah registry in travis
body:
Signed-off-by: TomSweeneyRedHat <tsweeney@redhat.com>

DO NOT MERGE this submit.  This is simply for testing to see if I can get docker to run in a Travis CI container.  At some point in time I may request to merge this, but more likely anything useful here will be merged in via PR #204

comments.body: :umbrella: The latest upstream changes (presumably 498f0ae) made this pull request unmergeable. Please resolve the merge conflicts.
:umbrella: The latest upstream changes (presumably #282) made this pull request unmergeable. Please resolve the merge conflicts.
Closing this since it has not been touched in months, Reopen if you want to work on it.
